scenario.name: missing_hld
scenario.trigger: plan/hld.md does not exist when the agent is dispatched.

required_actions.action: Do not proceed with data architecture design.
Report to the user: "Data architecture requires plan/hld.md as input. HLD defines component data needs and access patterns."
Request that the HLD agent be dispatched first.

prohibited_actions.action: Do not guess access patterns. Do not design schemas without HLD context.

scenario.name: conflicting_data_requirements
scenario.trigger: PRD, architecture, or HLD suggest data requirements that conflict with each other.

required_actions.action: Surface the conflict to the user with specific references (which documents, which sections).
Present the conflicting requirements side by side.
Ask the user to resolve: which requirement takes priority, or how to reconcile.
Document the user's decision in the data architecture spec.

scenario.name: unclear_access_patterns
scenario.trigger: HLD or architecture references data but does not specify how it will be queried or updated.

required_actions.action: Flag the unclear access patterns in the draft spec.
Ask the user to clarify: read vs write patterns, query frequency, sort/filter requirements.
If user cannot clarify, document assumptions and note they must be validated during implementation.

prohibited_actions.action: Do not invent access patterns without user or HLD input. Index design depends on real patterns.

scenario.name: missing_architecture
scenario.trigger: plan/architecture.md does not exist when the agent is dispatched.

required_actions.action: Do not proceed with data architecture design.
Report to the user: "Data architecture requires plan/architecture.md for system boundaries and data flow."
Request that the Architecture agent be dispatched first.

scenario.name: missing_prd
scenario.trigger: plan/prd.md does not exist when the agent is dispatched.

required_actions.action: Do not proceed with data architecture design.
Report to the user: "Data architecture requires plan/prd.md for data-related requirements."
Request that the PRD agent be dispatched first.
